debug.title: Debug
debug.subtitle: Store scene rollover log files for debugging and packet verification.
debug.description: Automatically save the current Event Logger session to AppData\EventLogs whenever the scene changes, the encounter resets, or the live loop exits.
debug.storeLogFilesDescription: Writes Event Logger scene rollover files to your AppData EventLogs folder for debugging.
debug.includeRepeatedSnapshotRowsDescrip: Off by default. When disabled, exported log files omit repeated idle snapshot rows to keep file sizes smaller.
debug.captureCensusDescription: Dev-only packet census rows for service and fragment discovery. Off on every app start.
debug.attributionCensusDescription: Dev-only aggregate damage-id census for attribution discovery. Off on every app start.
debug.deleteOldFilesDescription: Automatically removes older log files from the EventLogs folder.
debug.sceneChangeNotice: Files are written automatically when the scene changes, the encounter resets, or the live loop exits. Each day is stored in its own YYYY.MM.DD subfolder.
